SELECT ln(value) + 1 FROM test_ln WHERE value > 1.0;
SELECT ln((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_ln WHERE value > 0)) AS average_ln FROM test_ln;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (id INT, ref_value FLOAT);
SELECT ln(t.value) FROM test_ln t JOIN additional_data a ON ln(t.value) > a.ref_value;
SELECT ln(CASE WHEN value > 0 THEN value ELSE NULL END) FROM test_ln;
SELECT id, ln(ref_value) FROM additional_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM additional_data WHERE ref_value > 1);
